pageDescription: Extract text from supported attachments before the model runs, inject it into the message, and index chunks into memory for search. Settings are stored per agent.
agentTagsHint: Leave empty to include every agent. Add tags to limit saves to those agents only.
mixedAgentsHint: Selected agents differ: the switch shows “off” if any of them has indexing disabled. Saving applies the same on/off state to each selected agent.
title: RAG File Indexing
description: Extract text from supported attachments before the model runs, inject it into the message, and index chunks into memory for search.
formatsIntro: Supported types are checked live on the gateway when you open this page — you do not need to enable the option first.
builtInHint: Plain text and Markdown are read directly; no extra software on the gateway.
probeFailed: Could not reach the gateway to list extractors. Save still works; try again or check the server.
hintPdf: Python module pypdf or pdfplumber. Install via “Install missing packages” (pip:pypdf) or on the server: pip install pypdf
hintOfficeDocs: pandoc on PATH for Word/OpenDocument/EPUB. Install via “Install missing packages” (pandoc) or your OS package manager.
hintXlsx: Python openpyxl. Install via “Install missing packages” (pip:openpyxl) or: pip install openpyxl
hintPptx: Python python-pptx (import name pptx). Install via “Install missing packages” (pip:python-pptx) or: pip install python-pptx
installHowTo: Use “Install missing packages” if your gateway exposes /v1/packages/install (admin). Otherwise install the tools on the machine running GoClaw, then refresh this page.
toggleHint: Off by default. When enabled, supported attachments in a chat turn are expanded into text before the model runs and indexed into memory.
installHint: Extractors refreshed. Reopen this page anytime to verify.
